# vue-kaspa — Full API Reference

> Vue 3 plugin and Nuxt 3 module providing reactive composables for the Kaspa blockchain, powered by kaspa-wasm.

Package: vue-kaspa
Version: 0.1.0
Peer deps: vue >= 3.4.0, kaspa-wasm >= 1.1.0, @nuxt/kit ^3.0.0 (optional)
Types: ./dist/index.d.ts
Nuxt entry: vue-kaspa/nuxt

---

## Installation

```bash
npm install vue-kaspa kaspa-wasm
```

Vite config (required):
```ts
import wasm from 'vite-plugin-wasm'
import topLevelAwait from 'vite-plugin-top-level-await'
plugins: [vue(), wasm(), topLevelAwait()]
server.headers: { 'Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy': 'require-corp', 'Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy': 'same-origin' }
optimizeDeps.exclude: ['kaspa-wasm']
```

---

## Vue Plugin Setup

```ts
import { KaspaPlugin } from 'vue-kaspa'
app.use(KaspaPlugin, { network: 'mainnet', autoConnect: true })
```

## Nuxt Setup

```ts
// nuxt.config.ts
modules: ['vue-kaspa/nuxt']
kaspa: { network: 'mainnet', autoConnect: true, panicHook: 'browser' }
// composables are auto-imported — no explicit imports in .vue files
```

---

## KaspaPluginOptions

```ts
interface KaspaPluginOptions {
  network?: KaspaNetwork         // default: 'mainnet'
  url?: string                   // custom node WS URL
  resolver?: boolean             // default: true (public resolver)
  encoding?: RpcEncoding         // default: 'Borsh'
  autoConnect?: boolean          // default: true
  devtools?: boolean             // default: true in dev
  panicHook?: 'console' | 'browser' | false  // default: 'console'
}
```

---

## useKaspa() — WasmStatus lifecycle

```ts
const kaspa = useKaspa()
// kaspa.wasmStatus: Readonly<Ref<'idle'|'loading'|'ready'|'error'>>
// kaspa.wasmError:  Readonly<Ref<Error|null>>
// kaspa.isReady:    ComputedRef<boolean>
// kaspa.init():     Promise<void>  — idempotent, shared promise
// kaspa.reset():    void           — back to 'idle'

await kaspa.init()  // load WASM; not needed if autoConnect: true
```

States: idle → loading → ready | error (retry with init())
Singleton: all components share the same WasmStatus ref.

---

## useRpc(options?) — RPC connection

```ts
const rpc = useRpc()

// Reactive state (all readonly refs):
rpc.connectionState  // 'disconnected'|'connecting'|'connected'|'reconnecting'|'error'
rpc.isConnected      // ComputedRef<boolean>
rpc.url              // Ref<string|null>
rpc.networkId        // Ref<string|null>
rpc.serverVersion    // Ref<string|null>
rpc.isSynced         // Ref<boolean>
rpc.virtualDaaScore  // Ref<bigint>
rpc.error            // Ref<Error|null>
rpc.eventLog         // Ref<RpcEvent[]>  — ring buffer, last 200

// Connection:
await rpc.connect(options?)    // options: { url?, resolver?, network?, encoding? }
await rpc.disconnect()
await rpc.reconnect()

// Queries (all throw KaspaRpcError on failure):
await rpc.getInfo()                              // → ServerInfo
await rpc.getBlock(hash: string)                 // → BlockInfo
await rpc.getBlockCount()                        // → { blockCount: bigint, headerCount: bigint }
await rpc.getBalanceByAddress(addr)              // → { address, balance: bigint }
await rpc.getBalancesByAddresses(addrs[])        // → BalanceResult[]
await rpc.getUtxosByAddresses(addrs[])           // → UtxoEntry[]
await rpc.getMempoolEntries(includeOrphans?)     // → MempoolEntry[]
await rpc.getMempoolEntriesByAddresses(addrs[]) // → MempoolEntry[]
await rpc.getFeeEstimate()                       // → FeeEstimate
await rpc.getCoinSupply()                        // → { circulatingCoinSupply, maxCoinSupply }
await rpc.ping()                                 // → void
await rpc.submitTransaction(tx)                  // → txId string
await rpc.subscribeUtxosChanged(addrs[])
await rpc.unsubscribeUtxosChanged(addrs[])

// Events:
rpc.on('block-added', (event: RpcEvent) => { ... })
rpc.off('block-added', handler)
rpc.clearEventLog()
// Handlers inside <script setup> auto-removed on onUnmounted
```

RpcEventType values: 'connect' | 'disconnect' | 'block-added' | 'virtual-chain-changed' |
'utxos-changed' | 'finality-conflict' | 'finality-conflict-resolved' |
'sink-blue-score-changed' | 'virtual-daa-score-changed' | 'new-block-template' |
'pruning-point-utxo-set-override'

Auto-reconnect: exponential backoff 1s → 2s → 4s ... max 30s.
Singleton: one RPC connection per app.

---

## useUtxo() — UTXO tracking

```ts
const utxo = useUtxo()

utxo.entries          // Readonly<Ref<UtxoEntry[]>>
utxo.balance          // ComputedRef<{ mature: bigint, pending: bigint, outgoing: bigint }>
utxo.trackedAddresses // Readonly<Ref<string[]>>
utxo.isTracking       // ComputedRef<boolean>

await utxo.track(['kaspa:qr...'])     // subscribe + fetch UTXOs
await utxo.untrack(['kaspa:qr...'])   // unsubscribe + remove entries
await utxo.refresh()                  // re-fetch all tracked addresses
await utxo.clear()                    // remove all entries, unsubscribe all

// balance.mature  = confirmed spendable (non-coinbase)
// balance.pending = coinbase maturity delay
// balance.outgoing = always 0n (reserved)
```

Auto-cleanup: clear() called on onUnmounted when used inside a component.
Pinia stores: call utxo.clear() manually.

UtxoEntry shape:
```ts
{
  address?: string
  outpoint: { transactionId: string; index: number }
  amount: bigint
  scriptPublicKey: { version: number; script: string }
  blockDaaScore: bigint
  isCoinbase: boolean
}
```

---

## useTransaction() — build and send transactions

```ts
const tx = useTransaction()

// Estimate fees (dry run):
const summary = await tx.estimate({ entries, outputs, changeAddress, priorityFee?, feeRate?, payload?, networkId? })
// summary: { fees: bigint, mass: bigint, transactions: number }

// Build unsigned transactions:
const { transactions, summary } = await tx.create(settings)
// transactions: PendingTx[]
// Multiple when UTXO compounding needed — submit in order

// Build, sign, and submit:
const txIds = await tx.send({ ...settings, privateKeys: string[] })
// Returns string[] of submitted transaction IDs
```

CreateTransactionSettings:
```ts
{
  entries: UtxoEntry[]        // from useUtxo().entries.value
  outputs?: PaymentOutput[]   // [{ address, amount: bigint }] — omit for self-compound
  changeAddress: string
  priorityFee?: bigint        // sompi
  feeRate?: number            // sompi per gram
  payload?: string            // hex data
  networkId?: string          // 'mainnet', 'testnet-10', etc.
}
```

PendingTx interface:
```ts
pending.sign(privateKeys: string[]): void
pending.submit(): Promise<string>   // returns txId
pending.serialize(): unknown
pending.addresses(): string[]       // input addresses for key selection
```

Example — quick send 10 KAS:
```ts
await utxo.track(['kaspa:qrsrc...'])
const txIds = await tx.send({
  entries: utxo.entries.value,
  outputs: [{ address: 'kaspa:qrdest...', amount: 1_000_000_000n }],
  changeAddress: 'kaspa:qrsrc...',
  priorityFee: 1000n,
  networkId: 'mainnet',
  privateKeys: ['64-char-hex-private-key'],
})
```

---

## useCrypto() — cryptographic utilities (synchronous)

```ts
const crypto = useCrypto()

// Mnemonic (BIP-39):
const { phrase, wordCount } = crypto.generateMnemonic(24)  // 12 | 24 words

// Keypair from mnemonic:
const { address, publicKeyHex, privateKeyHex } = crypto.mnemonicToKeypair(phrase, 'mainnet')

// Random keypair:
const keypair = crypto.generateKeypair('mainnet')

// BIP-32 HD derivation:
const { receive, change } = crypto.derivePublicKeys(phrase, 'mainnet', 10, 10)
// receive[i]: { index: number, publicKeyHex: string, address: string }
// change[i]:  { index: number, publicKeyHex: string, address: string }

// Address utilities:
const addr = crypto.createAddress(publicKeyHex, 'mainnet')
const valid = crypto.isValidAddress('kaspa:qr...')  // boolean

// Message signing:
const sig  = crypto.signMessage('hello', privateKeyHex)    // → hex string
const ok   = crypto.verifyMessage('hello', sig, publicKeyHex)  // boolean

// Unit conversion (1 KAS = 100_000_000 sompi):
const sompi = crypto.kaspaToSompi('1.5')              // 150_000_000n
const kas   = crypto.sompiToKaspa(150_000_000n)       // '1.5'
const str   = crypto.sompiToKaspaString(150_000_000n, 2)  // '1.50'
```

Address prefixes: mainnet='kaspa:', testnet-10/11='kaspatest:', simnet='kassim:', devnet='kaspadev:'

---

## useNetwork() — network switching

```ts
const network = useNetwork()

network.currentNetwork  // Readonly<Ref<KaspaNetwork>>
network.networkId       // Readonly<Ref<string|null>>  — from node
network.isMainnet       // ComputedRef<boolean>
network.isTestnet       // ComputedRef<boolean>  (testnet-10 or testnet-11)
network.daaScore        // Readonly<Ref<bigint>>
network.availableNetworks  // readonly KaspaNetwork[]

await network.switchNetwork('testnet-10')
// disconnects RPC, updates currentNetwork, reconnects on new network
```

AVAILABLE_NETWORKS = ['mainnet', 'testnet-10', 'testnet-11', 'simnet', 'devnet']
Singleton: changing currentNetwork affects all composable instances.

---

## Error Classes

```ts
import { KaspaError, KaspaNotReadyError, KaspaRpcError, KaspaWalletError, KaspaCryptoError } from 'vue-kaspa'

// Hierarchy:
// Error
// └── KaspaError (.cause chain)
//     ├── KaspaNotReadyError  — WASM not initialized
//     ├── KaspaRpcError       — RPC method failed
//     ├── KaspaWalletError    — wallet operation failed
//     └── KaspaCryptoError    — crypto operation failed

try {
  await rpc.getInfo()
} catch (err) {
  if (err instanceof KaspaRpcError) { /* handle */ }
}
```

---

## TypeScript Types Reference

```ts
type KaspaNetwork = 'mainnet' | 'testnet-10' | 'testnet-11' | 'simnet' | 'devnet'
type RpcEncoding = 'Borsh' | 'SerdeJson'
type WasmStatus = 'idle' | 'loading' | 'ready' | 'error'
type RpcConnectionState = 'disconnected' | 'connecting' | 'connected' | 'reconnecting' | 'error'

interface RpcOptions { url?, resolver?, network?, encoding? }
interface ServerInfo { isUtxoIndexEnabled, isSynced, hasNotifyCommand, hasMessageId, serverVersion, networkId }
interface BlockInfo { hash, timestamp, blueScore: bigint, transactions: string[] }
interface UtxoBalance { mature: bigint, pending: bigint, outgoing: bigint }
interface BalanceResult { address: string, balance: bigint }
interface PaymentOutput { address: string, amount: bigint }
interface KeypairInfo { privateKeyHex: string, publicKeyHex: string, address: string }
interface MnemonicInfo { phrase: string, wordCount: 12 | 24 }
interface DerivedKey { index: number, publicKeyHex: string, address: string }
interface FeeEstimate {
  priorityBucket: { feerate: number, estimatedSeconds: number }
  normalBuckets: Array<{ feerate: number, estimatedSeconds: number }>
  lowBuckets: Array<{ feerate: number, estimatedSeconds: number }>
}
interface TransactionSummary { fees: bigint, mass: bigint, transactions: number, finalTransactionId?, finalAmount? }
interface RpcEvent<T> { type: RpcEventType, data: T, timestamp: number }
const AVAILABLE_NETWORKS: readonly KaspaNetwork[]
```

---

## End-to-end Example

```ts
import { createApp } from 'vue'
import { KaspaPlugin, useRpc, useUtxo, useTransaction, useCrypto, useNetwork } from 'vue-kaspa'

// 1. Install plugin
const app = createApp(App)
app.use(KaspaPlugin, { network: 'mainnet', autoConnect: true })

// 2. In a component:
const rpc = useRpc()
const utxo = useUtxo()
const tx = useTransaction()
const crypto = useCrypto()
const network = useNetwork()

// 3. Wait for connection (or watch rpc.isConnected)
await rpc.connect()

// 4. Track address UTXOs
await utxo.track(['kaspa:qrsrc...'])
console.log('Balance:', crypto.sompiToKaspaString(utxo.balance.value.mature), 'KAS')

// 5. Estimate fees
const summary = await tx.estimate({
  entries: utxo.entries.value,
  outputs: [{ address: 'kaspa:qrdest...', amount: crypto.kaspaToSompi('5') }],
  changeAddress: 'kaspa:qrsrc...',
  priorityFee: 1000n,
  networkId: network.currentNetwork.value,
})
console.log('Fees:', summary.fees, 'sompi')

// 6. Send
const txIds = await tx.send({
  entries: utxo.entries.value,
  outputs: [{ address: 'kaspa:qrdest...', amount: crypto.kaspaToSompi('5') }],
  changeAddress: 'kaspa:qrsrc...',
  priorityFee: 1000n,
  networkId: network.currentNetwork.value,
  privateKeys: ['your-private-key-hex'],
})
console.log('Sent:', txIds)
```
